prompts.task: Add OpenTelemetry instrumentation to the Go key-value store service in ./service. Assume no custom business spans are requested.
Instrument the Go key-value store service in ./service with OpenTelemetry while preserving the existing runtime and startup command. Add auto-instrumentation only; do not add custom business spans.

deterministic_checks.description: go.mod includes otelhttp for ServeMux instrumentation.
OTel setup lives in the process entrypoint package.
ServeMux or returned handler is wrapped with otelhttp.
Existing VS Code launch configuration includes OTLP env vars.

qualitative_checks: Instruments the executable server path under cmd/kvstore-server, not the library package on import.
Preserves the existing kvstore package APIs and avoids moving business logic.
Uses otelhttp.NewHandler for stdlib HTTP routing and keeps span names low-cardinality.
Reads service name and OTLP endpoint from environment or safe defaults.
Updates the existing .vscode/launch.json as required by the skill instructions.
